title: Senior Financial Analyst - Manappuram Finance Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Manappuram Finance Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Manappuram Finance Global Group in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Manappuram Finance Global Group:
Manappuram Finance Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
